narrative:
Precinct Madison Twp Rock Camp (precinct in Columbiana County) has 670 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points.
